doctor.name: Dr. Diksha Patel
doctor.tagline: Physiotherapist specialising in Orthopaedic & Neurological Rehabilitation
doctor.bio: Hi, I'm Dr. Diksha Patel, a dedicated physiotherapist with over 4 years of hands-on clinical experience. I specialise in Orthopaedic and Neurological rehabilitation — helping patients overcome pain, regain movement, and rebuild their independence after injury, surgery, or neurological events. I offer convenient online video consultations for patients across India, and home visits for those in and around Thane.

freeConsultationText: First consultation is completely FREE — call or WhatsApp now!

services.title: Online Consultation & Diagnosis
services.description: Expert physiotherapy assessment via video call — from anywhere in India. I evaluate your condition, diagnose the problem, and share a personalised recovery plan digitally.
highlights: Video call via Zoom or Google Meet
Personalised exercise plan shared via WhatsApp

services.title: Home Visit Physiotherapy
services.description: Full hands-on physiotherapy at your doorstep — ideal for elderly patients, post-surgery recovery, or anyone unable to travel. Covering Thane and nearby areas.

services.title: Orthopaedic Rehabilitation
services.description: Specialised treatment for joint pain, back pain, fractures, arthritis, sports injuries, and post-operative orthopaedic recovery.

services.title: Neurological Rehabilitation
services.description: Focused care for stroke, Parkinson's, Bell's palsy, cerebral palsy, and other neurological conditions — improving mobility, balance, and independence.

services.title: Pain Management
services.description: Evidence-based strategies for chronic back, neck, joint, and shoulder pain — combining manual therapy, electrotherapy, and targeted exercises.

services.title: Post-Surgery Rehabilitation
services.description: Structured recovery programmes after knee, hip, shoulder, or spinal surgeries — in-clinic, at home, or online.
